mappings.clause_text: Bank Administrator navigates to the LC Issuance Checklist configuration page to view all configured verification checkpoints
System retrieves all configured checklist items from persistent storage and displays items in a table with columns: S.N, Description, Status, Order, Actions
System establishes real-time subscription to checklist changes and automatically refreshes table when items are added/edited/deleted/toggled/reordered by any administrator
Page loads successfully and awaits user interaction
System displays table with empty state message when no checklist items have been configured
Bank Administrator clicks Add Item button on the LC Issuance Checklist page to initiate new item creation
Administrator enters description in textarea field and clicks Add Item button in dialog
System validates description is not empty before creating checklist item
System creates checklist item, assigns next sequential serial number (S.N), marks item as active by default, and stores to persistent storage
System closes dialog, displays success toast notification, and refreshes checklist display to show new item at end of list
Add Item button remains disabled in dialog when description is empty; no error message displayed
Description field must not be empty or whitespace-only; max length appropriate for display in table
Bank Administrator clicks pencil (edit) icon button next to a checklist item to initiate edit operation
System loads current description and opens Edit Checklist Item dialog
Administrator modifies description text and clicks Save Changes button in dialog
System validates description is not empty, updates item with new description in persistent storage, closes dialog, displays success notification, and refreshes display
System preserves item S.N, active status, and position during edit; updates are immediate and persist
Save Changes button is disabled when description is empty
Administrator can close dialog without saving by clicking Cancel or X button; item retains previous description
Bank Administrator clicks trash can (delete) icon button next to a checklist item to initiate delete operation
System removes item from persistent storage immediately without confirmation dialog
System removes item row from checklist table display and displays confirmation toast notification
System updates S.N values of subsequent items if renumbering is required after deletion
Deleted items are permanently removed and cannot be recovered; item completely removed from storage and all active checklists immediately
System displays "No checklist items configured" when all items are deleted
Bank Administrator clicks Status toggle switch for a checklist item in the table to initiate status change
System toggles the item's active status (Active → Inactive or Inactive → Active) when switch is clicked
System updates item status in data store immediately and updates toggle switch visual state to reflect new status
System displays success toast notification and refreshes the checklist table to reflect the status change
System reverts toggle switch to previous state if database error occurs; displays error message
Only Active checklist items are included in the LC review checklist presented to Branch and CTF teams; inactive items do not appear
Toggling an item's status is immediate and does not require additional confirmation
System allows deactivating the last active item, resulting in zero active items; checklist may be empty
Bank Administrator clicks up or down arrow button for a checklist item in the Order column to initiate reordering
System moves item up one position and decrements this item's sequence number by 1 when up arrow is clicked
System increments the previous item's sequence number by 1 and persists updated sequence numbers to data store
System moves item down one position and increments this item's sequence number by 1 when down arrow is clicked
System decrements the next item's sequence number by 1 and persists updated sequence numbers to data store
System refreshes checklist table to display new order and displays success notification
Up arrow button is disabled (grayed out) for the first item (S.N. 1)
Down arrow button is disabled (grayed out) for the last item in the list
System automatically renumbers all items to maintain sequential order (1, 2, 3...) after reordering; reordering is atomic
Checklist items are always displayed in their current sequence number order to maintain consistency across all LC reviews

ui_integration_clauses.text: System displays checklist table with columns: S.N, Description, Status toggle switch, Order buttons (up/down arrows), and Actions (Edit, Delete icons)
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: Frontend displays table with standard columns; backend must return all required fields (id, description, isActive, sequenceNumber)

ui_integration_clauses.text: System provides prominent Add Item button at top of page for quick access to create new items
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: Button is UI control; no backend logic required, but backend must support CreateLcIssuanceChecklistItem endpoint

ui_integration_clauses.text: Add Checklist Item dialog opens when Add Item button clicked, displaying Description textarea field
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: Dialog is UI component; backend must validate Description non-empty and return 400 if empty

ui_integration_clauses.text: Edit Checklist Item dialog pre-fills Description field with current item's description text when edit icon clicked
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: Backend must return current description; frontend pre-fills dialog; backend must validate non-empty Description on update

ui_integration_clauses.text: Delete operation occurs immediately without confirmation dialog when trash icon clicked
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: No confirmation UI; backend must execute immediate hard delete; frontend shows success toast on response

ui_integration_clauses.text: Status toggle switch displays current state visually (ON for active, OFF for inactive) with immediate visual feedback on click
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: UI shows visual toggle state; backend must return updated isActive status; frontend updates toggle appearance immediately

ui_integration_clauses.text: Arrow buttons in Order column are enabled/disabled based on item position (up arrow disabled for first, down arrow disabled for last)
ui_integration_clauses.gap_analysis: Frontend manages button enable/disable state based on position; backend must validate position constraints and return error if invalid

conflicts.title: Audit Logging for State Mutations
conflicts.description: FRS-LCI-04 and FRS-LCI-05 open questions (items 3 and 3 respectively) ask whether toggle/reorder changes should be logged for audit purposes. No explicit audit requirement specified in business rules, but Compliance Team involvement suggests regulatory concern.
conflicts.proposed_resolution: Adopt uniform audit logging for all state mutations (Toggle, Reorder, Delete), or establish explicit policy of no audit logging. Product Owner and Compliance Team decision required by 2026-05-01.

conflicts.title: Soft-Delete vs Hard-Delete Semantics
conflicts.description: FRS-LCI-03 Delete Checklist Item specifies immediate hard deletion with no restore capability. Open question 2 asks whether soft-delete (archive) should be available instead. Business rule states deleted items are permanently removed. No soft-delete entity pattern or archival table specified.
conflicts.proposed_resolution: Clarify whether hard delete is sufficient or if soft-delete/archival is required for regulatory compliance. If soft-delete is chosen, add IsDeleted flag to LcIssuanceChecklistItem entity and update all queries to exclude deleted items.

conflicts.title: Minimum Active Items Requirement
conflicts.description: FRS-LCI-04 Toggle Item Active Status open question 2 asks whether there should be a minimum number of active items required (e.g., at least 1 requirement must be active). Edge case EC-01 and EC-02 allow zero active items (empty checklist state).
conflicts.proposed_resolution: Product Owner and Business Owner decision: should system enforce at least 1 active item or allow 0? If enforced, add precondition check in ToggleLcIssuanceChecklistItemStatus command.

conflicts.title: Concurrent Modification Handling for Reorder
conflicts.description: FRS-LCI-05 Reorder specifies atomic swap of adjacent items with sequential S.N updates. Multiple edge cases (EC-02) mention rapid successive moves. No explicit optimistic locking or version field specified.
conflicts.proposed_resolution: Use EF Core optimistic concurrency with RowVersion field on LcIssuanceChecklistItem entity. Implement last-write-wins semantics or implement conflict detection and retry logic.

conflicts.title: Notification to Branch/CTF Staff on Status Change
conflicts.description: FRS-LCI-04 Toggle Item Active Status open question 1 asks whether deactivating an item should send notification to Branch/CTF staff. No integration event or notification service specified.
conflicts.proposed_resolution: If notification is required, publish domain event ChecklistItemStatusChanged and implement listener to send notifications. Otherwise, silent removal of inactive items is acceptable.

conflicts.title: Maximum Description Length and Validation
conflicts.description: FRS-LCI-01 and FRS-LCI-02 specify Description field must not be empty or whitespace-only and max length appropriate for display in table. Exact max length not specified; Open question 1 asks what max character length should be.
conflicts.proposed_resolution: Product Owner decision: specify exact max length (e.g., 500 chars, 1000 chars). Implement FluentValidation rule with MaxLength attribute on CreateLcIssuanceChecklistItemDto and UpdateLcIssuanceChecklistItemDto.

conflicts.title: Per-Tenant Data Scoping
conflicts.description: CLAUDE.md specifies per-customer (per-tenant) tenancy model. FRS documents do not explicitly mention TenantId filtering or tenant isolation. Bank Admin role may be tenant-scoped; confirm tenant filtering in all queries and commands.
conflicts.proposed_resolution: All LcIssuanceChecklistItem queries and commands must filter by CurrentTenant.Id. Add TenantId property to entity if not present. Ensure AppService precondition checks enforce tenant isolation.

tenancy_summary.entity_scoping: LcIssuanceChecklistItem must be scoped to TenantId; all queries and commands filtered by CurrentTenant.Id
ambiguities: FRS documents do not explicitly mention TenantId filtering; assume implicit tenant isolation per CLAUDE.md per-customer model
